description: React 19: Add React.createElement detection signal and update Server Components notes. No autoescape behavior change — JSX {} still escaped.

audit_references: React 19 release notes: Server Components stable
React 19 upgrade guide: createElement still used in compiled JSX

patches.justification: React.createElement is the compiled output of JSX and appears in all React codebases. Adding it as a detection signal improves framework detection confidence for projects using compiled JSX rather than the JSX transform.

update.detection.notes: React 19. JSX auto-escapes; Server Components and Server Actions create new data→HTML paths to audit. createElement compiled output still present.

patches.justification: Server Components and Server Actions are new SSR surfaces in React 19 that bypass traditional client-side sanitation assumptions. Operators should be aware when auditing React 19 codebases.

regression_fixtures.description: React framework detection signals must include React.createElement after pack application
React detection notes must mention Server Components after pack application
regression_fixtures.expected_delta: updates detection.notes with Server Components reference
